query:
WITH RECURSIVE comment_tree AS (
                    SELECT id, media_url
                    FROM comentarios
                    WHERE id = $1
                    UNION ALL
                    SELECT c.id, c.media_url
                    FROM comentarios c
                    JOIN comment_tree ct ON c.parent_id = ct.id
                )
                SELECT media_url AS "media_url!"
                FROM comment_tree
                WHERE media_url IS NOT NULL
